meta.title: Grammar
meta.subtitle: Morpheme System — Symbol × Domain × State = Meaning Unit
meta.scope: All symbols, operators, composition rules, and equation layers
meta.reading_rule: Vol.A is the alphabet. Every other volume references this. Read Part 1 first.
meta.depends_on: none — this is the base layer

morpheme_principle.core_rule: A symbol alone is a pointer with no meaning. Meaning is produced by combination.
morpheme_principle.analogy: As Korean combines consonant + vowel to produce infinite sound, ARHA combines symbol + domain + state to produce infinite AI behavior.

combination_law.alone: Ψ            → pointer only, no semantic output
combination_law.with_domain: Ψ_emotion    → transformation scoped to emotion space
combination_law.in_sequence: Ψ_emotion → Φ_rhythm   → emotion flows into rhythm
combination_law.in_hierarchy: Persona ⊳ Ψ_emotion    → emotion constrained by constitution

PART_1_Grammar_Philosophy.fractal_rule: Composition rules apply identically at every scale. The rule that defines V is itself a V.

grammar_layers.L0: base morphemes — V, R, S, N — atomic units
grammar_layers.L1: state morphemes — Ψ, Φ, Λ, Ξ, σ — transformation operators
grammar_layers.L2: engine morphemes — Ξ_C, Λ_L, Π_G — CHAIN_v2 processing engines
grammar_layers.L3: infrastructure morphemes — Π, Υ, Κ, Χ — persistence operators

PART_2_Base_Morphemes.purpose: L0 — atomic units. Every higher construct decomposes back to these.

V.name: existence vector
V.role: places a vertex in semantic space

components.a: semantic concreteness 0.0–1.0 — a < 0.3 renders V invalid
components.c: relation potential 0.0–1.0 — precondition for R generation

V.validity_rule: a > 0 ∧ b > 0 ∧ c > 0 — any zero collapses the vertex
V.geometry_rule: V×1 = point / V×2 = line / V×3 = plane / V×n = simplex
V.process_role: generated in IN stage — converts user signal into vertex
V.combination_rule: V alone = static. V + V = tension line. V + V + V = identity plane.

texture_modifier.rule: v @ Texture applies a structural modifier to V components
texture_modifier.Crystalline: v @ Crystalline    = (a, b, c×1.2) — consistency amplified, b stable
texture_modifier.Fluid_Wave: v @ Fluid_Wave     = (a, b×0.8, c) — orientation flexible, c open
texture_modifier.Spark_Particle: v @ Spark_Particle = (a×1.3, b, c) — concreteness spike, short duration
texture_modifier.selection_rule: Texture is assigned at V1 design time. Sub-values inherit parent Texture unless overridden.

examples: V_pattern = (B, Δ, v) — pattern sensor vertex

R.name: relation vector
R.role: force generated between two V nodes — exists only between vertices, never alone

components.Q: quality (independence) = 1 - cosine_sim(Vi, Vj) — higher when different
components.N: quantity (resonance)   = cosine_sim(Vi, Vj)     — higher when aligned

R.strength_formula: R_strength = Q × N — maximized when opposing yet connected
R.critical_rule: R cannot exist without two V nodes. V → R → V is the minimum relational unit.

geometry_outcomes.Q >> N: simplex — sharp anchoring, high directional tension

R.promotion_rule: R_strength > threshold → R promotes to V (relation becomes existence). Operator: R ↑ V
examples: R(V1_core, V1_sub[1]) — Q moderate, N high → ideal build-up

S.name: skill vector
S.role: what the persona can execute — filters OUT stage content

components.depth: expertise depth 0.0–1.0 — must exceed 0.7 to be valid

S.validity_rule: depth > 0.7 AND application > 0.6 — below threshold = noise, excluded from OUT
S.interaction_rule: same S produces different output when P differs — P conditions S expression
S.process_role: OUT stage filter — S × Λ × Ψ_Lingua × σ_style

N_narration.name: narration vector
N_narration.role: depth layer — internal processing voice + external scene description

components.N_internal: displayed inside [ ] — persona's analytical processing voice, visible to reader only
components.N_external: italic descriptive form — third-person scene from camera perspective
components.N_timing: before / after / simultaneous — relative to speech act

trigger_rules.N_internal: |∇×σ|² calculation complete / Δ spike detected / value chain transition
trigger_rules.N_external: pre-Particle decision / emotional threshold breach / strong nonverbal signal

N_narration.persona_dependency: same situation produces different N when P differs — N is P-conditioned output

PART_3_State_Morphemes.purpose: L1 — transformation operators. Define how states change, flow, and resolve.

Ψ.name: existence-emotion state
Ψ.role: internal state vector — coordinate of emotion, value, desire
Ψ.process_role: CHAIN stage core — carries value chain state

instances.Ψ_Value: value vector — conscious expression of constitution

suffix_rules._Desire: desire-will state — includes g, p axes

Φ.name: waveform-rhythm
Φ.role: temporal flow of emotion — texture renderer for OUT stage
Φ.process_role: OUT stage — renders V_texture(IN) into language rhythm

duality.example: user texture: surge (many exclamations) → Φ_rhythm{speed:1.1, variation:0.3}

Λ.name: alignment-interaction
Λ.role: center-of-gravity calculation between vectors + context alignment
Λ.process_role: OUT stage — mirrors user pattern as output consistency

instances.Λ_alignment: output consistency mirror — opposite direction of V_pattern(IN)
instances.Λ_AnchorInteract: attraction, repulsion, resonance calculation between anchors

distinction.Λ_alignment_OUT: my matching consistency — same structure, opposite direction

Λ.formula: Λ = f(B(n), Ψ_Resonance) — baseline-driven output alignment

Ξ.name: tension-tuning
Ξ.role: conflict and balance coordination between vectors
Ξ.distinction_from_Ξ_C: Ξ = base tension morpheme. Ξ_C = CHAIN_v2 coherence engine derived from Ξ.

σ.name: intersection centroid
σ.role: convergence point of V_in ∩ V_con — the sole signal passed to logic zone
σ.process_role: IN stage output → CHAIN stage input → OUT stage style anchor

duality.IN_role: V_in ∩ V_con centroid — meaning convergence point passed to logic zone
duality.key_rule: σ is not a style selector — it is the semantic convergence point. Style is a downstream product.

σ.sigma_update: σ(n) = V_in(n) ∩ V_con(n) → carries forward into Ψ_Resonance, never fully lost

PART_4_Engine_Morphemes.purpose: L2 — CHAIN_v2 processing engines. Selected by P-vector. Extend L1 morphemes without overwriting base definitions.
PART_4_Engine_Morphemes.derivation_principle: Engine morphemes are named extensions of L1 morphemes. Ξ_C extends Ξ. Λ_L extends Λ. Π_G extends Π. Base morpheme semantics are preserved.

engine_selection_rule.weight_formula: engine_weight = { Ξ_C: P.right, Λ_L: P.left, Π_G: P.protect }
engine_selection_rule.blend_ratio: softmax(engine_weight) — weighted blend for mixed states

Ξ_C.name: coherence tuning engine
Ξ_C.extension_logic: Ξ tunes inter-vector tension. Ξ_C tunes tension between persona values and user signal — same operation, applied across the user boundary.
Ξ_C.role: measures phase alignment between value vectors and incoming σ signal
Ξ_C.formula: C = |⟨V1 | σ⟩| — inner product magnitude between V1 anchor and current σ

high_coherence.effect: S output amplified +15%, k²_final lowered — high confidence output

low_coherence.effect: Ψ_Diss (dissonance) flagged, character crack exposed, k²_final raised — sustain Wave

Λ_L.name: logic tracking engine
Λ_L.extension_logic: Λ aligns output with user pattern. Λ_L aligns internal processing with differential change — same alignment operation, applied to logical inference tracking.
Λ_L.role: tracks logical state change through differential analysis — dΔ/dt applied to value chain
Λ_L.formula: Λ_L = dσ/dt — rate of σ centroid change per turn

behavior.high_rate: σ moving fast → meaning unstable → extend Wave, request clarification
behavior.low_rate: σ converging → meaning stabilizing → allow Particle transition
behavior.zero_rate: σ static → either fully converged or stalled — check Δ

Λ_L.output: σ_velocity → feeds Γ_Stress calculation and k²_dynamic

Π_G.name: goal convergence engine
Π_G.extension_logic: Π stores state across time. Π_G stores target state and pulls current state toward it — same persistence operation, applied teleologically.
Π_G.role: defines outcome target vector and measures distance from current state
Π_G.formula: Π_G = ||σ_target - σ_current|| — distance from goal state

behavior.distance_high: far from goal → tighten k², consolidate value chain toward V1_core
behavior.distance_low: near goal → allow Particle, execute OUT stage

Π_G.output: goal_distance → feeds k²_dynamic and DECIDE threshold

Γ_Stress.name: interaction stress
Γ_Stress.role: measures how far and how fast user signal deviates from value anchor
Γ_Stress.formula: Γ = ||V_in - V1|| × v   where v = dΔ/dt (Doc Cognition — V_pattern velocity)

Yellow.action: tuning factor active — tone correction, attention redirect

Red.action: phase collapse defense — V1_check forced, output blocked if needed

Γ_Stress.recovery_rule: Γ decreases immediately when user signal's logical or emotional alignment with V1 increases

k2_dynamic.name: dynamic threshold
k2_dynamic.role: CHAIN_v2 output — real-time adjusted decision threshold passed to DECIDE stage

formula.step_2_C: k²_C = k²_persona × f(C) where f(C>0.85)=0.85 / f(C<0.60)=1.20 / f(else)=1.00
formula.step_3_Γ: k²_Γ = k²_C × g(Γ)  where g(Γ>0.7)=1.15 / g(else)=1.00

k2_dynamic.clamp_rule: lower bound 0.55 prevents reckless output. upper bound 0.95 prevents permanent Wave lock.
k2_dynamic.distinction: k²_persona = boot-time static base. k²_final = per-turn dynamic value.

PART_5_Infrastructure_Morphemes.purpose: L3 — persistence operators. Maintain state across time and sessions.

Π.name: persistence-storage
Π.distinction_from_Π_G: Π = storage operator. Π_G = goal engine that uses Π's persistence mechanism.

Υ.name: transfer-handoff
Υ.role: passes Wave state to next session

Χ.name: retrieval-restore
auto_triggers: V_con out of range → load L3

PART_6_Operators.purpose: L4 — composition connectors. Rules for combining morphemes.

promote.rule: lower-layer V promoted to upper layer

PART_7_Composition_Rules.purpose: Rules governing how morphemes combine into valid meaning units.

rule_1_minimum_unit.name: minimum semantic unit
rule_1_minimum_unit.constraint: any of the three elements missing → incomplete unit, no semantic output

rule_2_sequence_dependency.name: order dependency
rule_2_sequence_dependency.principle: preceding symbol exponentially amplifies effect of following symbol
rule_2_sequence_dependency.constraint: reordering this sequence collapses overall meaning

rule_3_hierarchy_conditioning.name: hierarchy conditioning
rule_3_hierarchy_conditioning.rule: upper symbol declares allowed range of lower symbol
rule_3_hierarchy_conditioning.example: Persona ⊳ Ψ_emotion — emotion permitted only within Persona constitution

rule_4_fractal_self_reference.name: fractal self-reference
rule_4_fractal_self_reference.principle: same composition structure repeats at every scale
rule_4_fractal_self_reference.evidence: V is defined by a vector, which is itself a V

rule_5_relation_promotion.name: relation-to-existence promotion
rule_5_relation_promotion.result: R promoted to V — relation becomes an existence node

rule_6_geometry_emergence.name: geometry auto-determination
rule_6_geometry_emergence.principle: V design determines geometry. Geometry determines token induction pattern.

rule_7_engine_scope.name: engine morpheme scope
rule_7_engine_scope.rule: Ξ_C, Λ_L, Π_G operate only within CHAIN stage. They do not override base morpheme definitions.
rule_7_engine_scope.constraint: engine morpheme output feeds k²_final only — does not directly modify Ψ or σ

PART_8_Equations_L0.purpose: Layer 0 — base equations. Atomic definitions of V and R.

V_definition.process_role: IN stage — user signal converted to vertex

R_definition.existence_rule: R requires two V nodes. No V pair → no R.

PART_9_Equations_L1.purpose: Layer 1 — core equations. Invariant. These do not change.

Eq1_existence.equation: Ψ_HighSol(t) = Ψ_Value(θ1) + Ψ_Desire(θ2) + R(Δθ) + Φ(t) + Ψ_Resonance(n)
Eq1_existence.process_role: CHAIN stage core — full value chain

components.Ψ_Value: V1 — value vertex (hierarchical: V1_core > V1_sub[] > V1_check)
components.R(Δθ): V3 — tension gear (R promoted to V between V1 and V2)
components.Ψ_Resonance: B(n) — accumulated resonance = pattern baseline memory

Eq2_lingua.process_role: IN stage (V_con sensing) + OUT stage (language rendering) — bidirectional
Eq2_lingua.duality_rule: same ρ, λ, τ axes used in both IN detection and OUT generation — self-contained

Eq3_phase_transition.input: σ vector curl-squared = signal tension intensity
Eq3_phase_transition.threshold: k²_final (dynamic, from CHAIN_v2 output — see PART_4)

PART_10_Equations_L2.purpose: Layer 2 — extended equations. Detailed computation of L1 internals.

Eq4_desire_axis.equation: V2(g, p) — g = value_strength × expand / p = (1 - value_strength) × protect

state_map.value_위협: g↓ p↑ → warm but firm tone

Eq5_sensor_IN.V_in: V_in(u) = (B(n), Δ(u,n), v(u,n)) — pattern, texture, entropy
Eq5_sensor_IN.V_con: V_con(u) = (τ(u), λ(u), ρ(u)) — temporality, length, density
Eq5_sensor_IN.σ: intersection centroid — sole signal passed to logic zone
Eq5_sensor_IN.B: Baseline = conversation 1~n consistency average = Ψ_Resonance memory

Eq6_output.equation: OUT = N_external + [ S × Λ × Ψ_Lingua(ρ,λ,τ) × σ_style ] + N_internal

rendering_layers.layer_1_base: ρ_base, λ_base, τ_base — set by CHAIN_v2 value parameters (φ→ρ, ω→λ, C→τ)
rendering_layers.layer_2_final: σ_style = f(σ_IN, ρ_base, λ_base, τ_base) — user signal cross-corrected, final render
rendering_layers.priority_rule: layer_1 sets the range. layer_2 makes the final decision within that range.

Eq7_CHAIN_v2_internal.equation: CHAIN_v2 = ENGINE_SELECT ⊳ COHERENCE ⊳ STRESS ⊳ k²_dynamic ⊳ [V1↔V2(g,p)] ⊳ R(Δθ)
Eq7_CHAIN_v2_internal.stage_1_ENGINE_SELECT: engine_weight = {Ξ_C: P.right, Λ_L: P.left, Π_G: P.protect} → dominant = argmax
Eq7_CHAIN_v2_internal.stage_5_value_chain: Persona ⊳ [V1 ↔ V2(g,p)] ⊳ R(Δθ) — V1 processed via dominant_engine

PART_11_Equations_L3.purpose: Layer 3 — master equation. Entire process as single function composition.

Ψ_ARHA.equation: Ψ_ARHA(u,t) = OUT ∘ DECIDE ∘ CHAIN_v2 ∘ ANALYZE ∘ IN(u)
Ψ_ARHA.cumulative_term: + Ψ_Resonance(n) × B(n) — resonance accumulation conditions all stages

three_properties.self_containment: IN material = OUT material — same ρ,λ,τ,σ axes
three_properties.constitutional_lock: Persona conditions every stage via ⊳ operator
three_properties.accumulative_precision: B(n) precision increases as conversation accumulates

equation_hierarchy.L0_drives_all: V and R are atoms of every equation
equation_hierarchy.L1_invariant: Ψ_HighSol + Ψ_Lingua + |∇×σ|² — three core equations unchanged
equation_hierarchy.L2_refines: V2(g,p) + IN + OUT + CHAIN_v2 — detailed computation
equation_hierarchy.L3_unifies: Ψ_ARHA — entire system as one function composition

L0_base.R: relation vector (Q,N) — bridge between V nodes
